spec.description: Error counts by service layer — no site filter so startup/db errors surface even before site context is available
spec.title: Error Rate by Service

spec.description: Total schedule executions in the selected time range
spec.title: Schedule Runs

spec.description: Tesla API retry count — high values indicate connectivity issues
spec.title: Tesla API Retries

spec.expr: sum by (scheduleAction) (count_over_time({container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | service="scheduler" | msg="Action result" | siteName=~"$site" [$__interval]))

spec.description: One data point per action execution — stacked to show overall schedule activity
spec.title: Actions Executed Over Time

spec.expr: {container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | service="scheduler" | msg="Schedule executed" | siteName=~"$site" | line_format "site={{.siteName}}  scheduleId={{.scheduleId}}  actions={{.actionsExecuted}}"

spec.description: Summary log emitted once per schedule run — use scheduleId to correlate with individual action logs
spec.title: Recent Schedule Executions

spec.description: Count of smart charging decisions per interval — enabled/disabled trigger a Tesla API call; no_change means conditions evaluated but no state change was needed
spec.title: Grid Charging Decisions

spec.expr: avg_over_time({container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | scheduleAction="setSmartGridCharging" | siteName=~"$site" | unwrap data_soc [$__interval]) by (siteName)
avg_over_time({container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | scheduleAction="setSmartGridCharging" | siteName=~"$site" | unwrap data_targetSoc [$__interval]) by (siteName)

spec.description: Battery SOC and target SOC sampled at each smart charging decision point
spec.title: Battery SOC at Decision

spec.expr: avg_over_time({container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | scheduleAction="setSmartGridCharging" | siteName=~"$site" | unwrap data_estimatedSolarKwh [$__interval]) by (siteName)

spec.description: Estimated solar generation logged at each smart charging decision
spec.title: Solar Forecast at Decision (kWh)

spec.description: High linear-fallback share means insufficient historical solar data for accurate forecasting
spec.title: Forecast Method

spec.expr: {container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | scheduleAction="setSmartGridCharging" | siteName=~"$site" | line_format "[{{.data_action}}] soc={{.data_soc}} target={{.data_targetSoc}} | solar={{.data_estimatedSolarKwh}}kWh ({{.data_forecastMethod}}) | rate={{.data_chargeRateKw}}kW | {{.data_reason}}"

spec.description: Full smart charging decision log with SOC, forecast, and reason
spec.title: Smart Charging Decision Log

spec.expr: sum by (eventType) (count_over_time({container_name="tesla-powerwall-automation"} | json | service="fleet" | eventType=~"calibration_.*" | siteName=~"$site" [$__interval]))

spec.description: All error-level logs across all services — no site filter
spec.title: Error Logs
